problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
hypothesis: Constructed wetland for water filtration may resolve How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
